page:
# Day 4: Phytoplankton and Primary Production
## Focus
Photosynthetic microorganisms, chlorophyll, productivity, and seasonal blooms.
## Learning Objectives
- Describe the ecological importance of phytoplankton. - Explain primary production in marine systems. - Connect bloom dynamics to nutrient availability and oxygen stress.
## Core Topics
### Phytoplankton as Primary Producers
Phytoplankton convert light energy into chemical energy and support marine food webs from the surface ocean upward.
### Measuring Productivity
Scientists estimate productivity using chlorophyll concentration, oxygen production, carbon uptake, and satellite data.
### Blooms and Dead Zones
When nutrient inputs rise, blooms can intensify. Some bloom events contribute to hypoxia when decomposition removes oxygen from the water column.
## Applied Activity
In your notebook, explain the difference between:
- high biomass - high productivity - healthy ecosystem function
Then give one reason those ideas may not always mean the same thing.
## Discussion Prompt
How can a process that supports life also contribute to ecological stress under some conditions?
